category_sources: The official OpenSLP site describes it as an implementation of the IETF Service Location Protocol.
source_facts.description says it implements Service Location Protocol.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage identifies the official OpenSLP project site.
docs_sources: Official OpenSLP documentation includes the User Guide and Programmer's Guide under openslp.org/doc/html.
repo_sources: The official OpenSLP development page gives the Mercurial repository URL for source checkout.
tags_sources: The official OpenSLP site says the project implements the IETF Service Location Protocol.
source_facts.description identifies Service Location Protocol implementation.
